mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_report (stock_code, stock_name, analysis_date, market, current_price, change_pct, total_score, signal, confidence, summary, technical_analysis, fundamental_analysis, news_analysis, full_report, llm_response, agent_mode, llm_model, duration_seconds, token_usage, is_dry_run, created_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{analysisDate}, #{market}, #{currentPrice}, #{changePct}, #{totalScore}, #{signal}, #{confidence}, #{summary}, #{technicalAnalysis}, #{fundamentalAnalysis}, #{newsAnalysis}, #{fullReport}, #{llmResponse}, #{agentMode}, #{llmModel}, #{durationSeconds}, #{tokenUsage}, #{isDryRun}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_report SET stock_code=#{stockCode}, stock_name=#{stockName}, analysis_date=#{analysisDate}, market=#{market}, current_price=#{currentPrice}, change_pct=#{changePct}, total_score=#{totalScore}, signal=#{signal}, confidence=#{confidence}, summary=#{summary}, technical_analysis=#{technicalAnalysis}, fundamental_analysis=#{fundamentalAnalysis}, news_analysis=#{newsAnalysis}, full_report=#{fullReport}, llm_response=#{llmResponse}, agent_mode=#{agentMode}, llm_model=#{llmModel}, duration_seconds=#{durationSeconds}, token_usage=#{tokenUsage}, is_dry_run=#{isDryRun} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY analysis_date DESC
SELECT * FROM analysis_report ORDER BY analysis_date DESC
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE analysis_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY analysis_date DESC
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE market = #{market} ORDER BY analysis_date DESC
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE signal = #{signal} ORDER BY analysis_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analysis_report WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
